special_mechanics.name: Tractor Beam Capture
special_mechanics.description: Boss Galaga enemies can capture the player's ship via tractor beam, returning it to formation and costing a life

special_mechanics.name: Dual-Fighter
special_mechanics.description: When a captured ship is rescued by shooting down the Boss Galaga during its dive, it joins the player's ship creating a dual-fighter with additional firepower and larger hitbox

special_mechanics.name: Enemy Morphing
special_mechanics.description: Some enemies morph into new enemy types with different attack patterns during gameplay

tier_notes: Tier 2: Galaga NES is a fixed shooter arcade port. Available sources (TCRF redirect and Wikipedia article) provide no detailed physics, movement parameters, gravity, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system documentation. This is expected for a fixed shooter paradigm where the player controls horizontal movement only within screen bounds. Precise technical specifications are not publicly documented in general gaming databases.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Galaga (NES, Namco) redirect
